categories.title: Pumps
categories.description: Pumps come in a variety of designs and choosing the right one depends on the job you need it to perform. This overview will help you better understand the different pump designs and find the one that is right for your system.

categories.title: Solutions
categories.description: Grundfos solutions is where we offer you the significant advantages of full optimisation for your complete system. Grundfos solutions can be tailored for a specific application or installation in buildings, industry, water utility and water treatment.

categories.title: Pump systems
categories.description: Grundfos pump systems are designed to fit your application needs, from standard pump kits and units to complete pressure booster packages and engineered-to-order pumping systems. We design lifecycle costs into our pump systems to provide maximum reliability, ensuring you get an optimised, energy-efficient and intelligent solution for any given application.

categories.title: Chemical dosing pumps and solutions
categories.description: To achieve and maintain high water quality standards, you need the right chemical dosing pumps and solutions to support smarter water treatment.

categories.title: Measurements and controls
categories.description: Get a complete overview of all Grundfos measurement and control products for use in water treatment and dosing applications.

categories.title: Controls and monitoring
categories.description: Pump controllers from Grundfos are designed to support a wide range of Grundfos products. These pump control systems are all constructed to be easily integrated into larger systems, making them an ideal solution if you are looking to gain complete control of pump systems.

categories.title: Agitators
categories.description: Agitators, such as small-scale submersible mixers and large-scale flowmakers, are designed for prefabricated pumping stations and large tanks respectively. They ensure that particles remain evenly distributed in wastewater and sludge, preventing sedimentation and supporting treatment processes.

categories.title: Accessories
categories.description: Get a quick overview of the Grundfos accessories that can make your pump solution a perfect fit for a wide variety of applications.

categories.title: Services
categories.description: Service offerings throughout selection, installation, operation and replacement of pumps.

categories.title: Lifting station
categories.description: Grundfos installation-ready lifting stations ensure efficient and reliable removal of wastewater from a buildings wastewater pumping station.

categories.title: Fire systems
categories.description: Get a complete overview of highly reliable fire protection pumps and systems from Grundfos for on- and offshore applications.

categories.title: Pump motors
categories.description: Grundfos offers a comprehensive range of intelligent, energy-efficient pump motors for use in a variety of pumps and applications. Integrated frequency converters in motors help to ensure that the pump motor efficiency remains at an optimal level.

categories.title: Pressure managers
categories.description: A Grundfos pressure manager is essentially a pump pressure controller designed to control your pump. The pressure managers are available in two solutions: basic flexibility and all-round control, ensuring that your pressure needs are always covered.

applicationAreas.name: Commercial buildings
applicationAreas.description: From hotels and hospitals to office towers and airports, every commercial building has its own special requirements. Grundfos offers a complete range of commercial water pump systems that bring high performance and energy efficiency, while ensuring optimal comfort and safety in a wide range of applications, including air-conditioning, cooling, heating, fire protection, wastewater and water disinfection.

applications.name: Commercial heating
applications.description: In a commercial heating system, energy-efficient pumps are only half the story. But with the right system design, you can truly reap the benefits and significantly reduce the energy bill.

applications.name: Commercial air conditioning
applications.description: Improve user comfort and reduce life-cycle costs with intelligent pumps that integrate easily into your air-based or hydronic cooling system.

applications.name: Commercial fire protection
applications.description: To protect people and property from fires in commercial buildings, Grundfos supplies fire pump systems, fire pumps for sprinkler systems and firefighting pumps that deliver the reliability required.

applications.name: Commercial water pressure boosting
applications.description: Ensuring optimal water pressure can be a challenge. However, you can overcome that challenge by means of an efficient and reliable booster system, which communicates with the entire system, and thus reducing life-cycle costs.

applications.name: Commercial wastewater
applications.description: Commercial buildings have vastly different requirements for wastewater transfer. Grundfos supplies wastewater pumps and lift station pumps ensure superior reliability and safety, as well as high efficiency.

applications.name: Commercial water disinfection
applications.description: Grundfos supplies dosing pumps and systems for commercial water disinfection, anti-scaling, anti-fouling and anti-corrosion for domestic water systems, air conditioning systems, boiler and heating systems.

applications.name: Commercial hot water recirculation
applications.description: Using constant temperature hot water recirculating pumps, you get continuous and efficient hot water recirculation in the building with hot water at the right temperature from all taps.

applicationAreas.name: District energy
applicationAreas.description: A district energy system transports heated or chilled water from one or more larger energy production plants to a range of consumers through a closed network of pipes.

applications.name: District heating
applications.description: District heating systems distribute heat to residential, commercial and industrial buildings. Grundfos offers a variety of efficient and reliable pumps that contribute to making district heating one of the most popular heating systems in the world.

applications.name: District cooling
applications.description: Cooling is at the very centre of a wide range of industrial applications and it is ever expanding, replacing individual chiller systems in buildings. With a host of solutions, Grundfos contributes directly to the production of cooling for buildings and industries.

applicationAreas.name: Domestic buildings
applicationAreas.description: A family home is a place of comfort. In a domestic building, a number of water pump systems play important roles in ensuring and maintaining a high level of comfort for the family.

applications.name: Domestic heating
applications.description: Heating pumps are essential components of a comfortable home. High-efficiency circulator pumps offer total reliability, easy installation and significant energy savings through intelligent technology.

applications.name: Domestic hot water recirculation
applications.description: With a hot water circulator pump, you can provide hot water to your customers in an instant, eliminating water waste and reducing the annoying wait for hot water.

applications.name: Domestic ground water intake
applications.description: Groundwater is essential for water supply. Providing a reliable, fresh supply of water for all homeowners is equally essential, particularly for those whose water source is a private groundwater well.

applications.name: Domestic rainwater harvesting
applications.description: Rainwater harvesting is used for collecting surface water, storing, and pumping it into the home for purposes such as flushing toilets, watering gardens, or even washing clothes. Rainwater harvesting pump systems from Grundfos are an efficient way to save significantly on domestic water consumption.

applications.name: Domestic water pressure boosting
applications.description: Low or varying water pressure in the home? A water pressure pump solves the very common problems of low-pressure showers and trickling taps that reduce comfort in one- or two-family homes.

applications.name: Domestic wastewater
applications.description: With a series of optimised drainage pump systems, lifting stations and sump pumps, you can gain full control of domestic wastewater.

applicationAreas.name: Industrial processes
applicationAreas.description: Grundfos delivers a range of solutions to help you maintain your industrial processes, covering areas such as liquid composition and integrating individual components in existing systems. An industrial process pump from Grundfos is built to withstand aggressive media and can be used in a wide range of industrial processes.

applications.name: Machining
applications.description: The machine tool coolant pumps and high-pressure pumps used in machining processes in industry require precise pump speed and control. With Grundfos, you benefit when your system is integrated with controls and monitoring.

applications.name: Industrial cleaning process
applications.description: Wash and clean tasks can be demanding due to aggressive detergents and high temperatures. Grundfos supplies compact and reliable pumps for a range of specialist wash and clean applications.

applications.name: Process liquids transfer
applications.description: A wide range of pumps for the transfer of water, cooling lubricants and other liquids in industrial and process systems.

applicationAreas.name: Industrial temperature control
applicationAreas.description: Improve safety and efficiency in your heating, cooling and refrigeration systems while cutting running and lifecycle costs with Grundfos temperature control.

applications.name: Industrial heating
applications.description: Solutions for industrial heating applications meet great demands every day from very high temperatures to delicate processes that require extreme precision. There is a high efficiency heat pump from Grundfos for any need.

applications.name: Industrial cooling
applications.description: Industrial applications, such as machining processes and heating systems rely on the efficient transfer of heat. Grundfos supplies efficient, reliable pumps and systems for a broad range of cooling applications and for OEM cooling units.

applicationAreas.name: Water treatment
applicationAreas.description: At Grundfos, we are dedicated to delivering pumps and systems to help our partners deliver best-in-class water treatment solutions.

applications.name: Industrial water supply and transfer
applications.description: For industrial water supply, Grundfos supplies intelligent pumps as part of fully-integrated and optimised solutions for pressure boosting, level control, liquid transport or filtration, ensuring an optimal infrastructure on your production site.

applications.name: Industrial wastewater treatment and reuse
applications.description: Grundfos offers solutions that add value to every step of wastewater treatment required for safe and compliant discharge or for water reuse in your facility. You get the most efficient treatment combined with intelligent measurement and control for maximum safety and minimum downtime.

applications.name: Industrial process water treatment
applications.description: Our advanced pumping solutions are more intelligent, more capable and more reliable, with autonomous, data-driven technology that connects and optimizes your entire system  ultimately saving you time, money and maintenance.

applications.name: Desalination
applications.description: Desalination processes require great amounts of power and chemical products, and Grundfos supplies desalination and reverse osmosis pumps that are highly efficient and corrosion resistant to cope with the stress of the operating environment.

applications.name: Deionisation/ion exchange
applications.description: Grundfos uses advanced technology to remove dissolved ions in water through the EDI/PEDI process. No hydrochloric acid or sodium hydroxide is needed. We provide demineralization units for medium-high flows and portable demineralizers as an alternative to on-site regeneration systems.

applications.name: Reverse osmosis
applications.description: By utilizing state-of-the-art high-efficiency membrane technology and top-quality materials, Grundfos offers fully pre-assembled and customizable RO systems that are quick to install. With decades of experience and a global track record in RO installations, Grundfos is a trusted industry leader.

applications.name: Ultrafiltration
applications.description: Grundfos ULF ultrafiltration line treats water (surface, well, and seawater) up to 140 m3/h. It removes solids, micro-pollutants, and bacteria/viruses. PVDF TIPS hollow fiber membranes ensure durability, and installation is made easy at Grundfos facility in Italy.

applications.name: Water filtration
applications.description: Engineered to solve complex drinking and process water challenges, our multi-layer filters deliver the efficient removal of arsenic, iron, manganese, ammonia, turbidity and other contaminants.

applications.name: Water softening
applications.description: Grundfos offers a diverse range of professional water softening systems. They reduce water hardness, treat different flow rates, and incorporate advanced technologies for efficiency. Industrial models provide corrosion-resistant tank options.

applications.name: Electrodeionization
applications.description: Grundfos compact and modular EDI systems ensure high-quality demineralized water using ion exchange membranes, resins and electricity. EDI utilizes chemical-free regeneration, ensuring continuous operation with no downtime, ideal for applications requiring reliable supply of ultrapure water.

applications.name: Deaeration
applications.description: Grundfos deaeration systems effectively remove dissolved gases, such as oxygen and carbon dioxide, from water to prevent corrosion and improve water quality. Designed for industrial processes, our systems use selected components to ensure maximum reliability and low maintenance.

applicationAreas.name: HVAC OEM
applicationAreas.description: Discover the wide range of integrated system solutions we offer to suit your specific HVAC application requirements.

applications.name: OEM Boiler
applications.description: HVAC OEM boilers offer a high level of customisation and flexibility, while integrated circulators ensure robustness. Depending on your needs, you can choose from wall-hung or floor-standing solutions, systems or combi boilers.

applications.name: OEM Heat pump
applications.description: Grundfos HVAC OEM heat pump systems are designed to maximise your heating system efficiency and minimise its running and life cycle costs. To ensure these benefits, HVAC heat pumps feature ECM pumps that offer both high-level efficiency and variable speed.

applications.name: OEM Solar thermal
applications.description: Solar collectors convert sunlight into heat that can be used for heating or to supply domestic hot water to buildings. In pressurised thermal solar systems, pumps must stand in glycol-based solar liquids with a high temperature range.

applications.name: OEM Cooling
applications.description: Floor-heating or ceiling-cooling systems with reversible heat pumps can heat rooms in winter and cool the air in summer with one system. In Aircon systems, circulators are used to transport heat from air to water heaters to cooling towers or chillers.

applications.name: OEM Domestic hot water
applications.description: DWH pumps are used for recirculation or generation. They recirculate DHW from tap to tank or heat exchanger to ensure instant hot water, avoid stagnation and limit water waste. Or to circulate water between a heat exchanger and DHW storage tank, probably with diverter valve for stratification tank.

applications.name: OEM Heating interface units
applications.description: Heat Interface Units are used in houses and flats to transfer heat from the district heating system to a decentralised domestic hot water system. These units comprise PHE, control valves, controller, energy meter, pressure relief valve expansion vessel and pumps  as if a boiler IWC.

applications.name: OEM Space heating
applications.description: Heating distribution kits are pre-manufactured units. There are pumps for different zones with or without mixing valves. For systems with a hydraulic separator or buffer tank, distribution pumps are independent from the heat generator and primary pump and can be internally controlled like ALPHA.

applicationAreas.name: Municipal water supply
applicationAreas.description: From the raw water intake to the treatment regime and onwards through the distribution network to the consumer, a water supply system must be fully integrated. Grundfos ensures that pumps, controls, dosing and disinfection solutions and pressure management work together for optimal water and energy efficiency.

applications.name: Surface water intake
applications.description: You require a cost-effective, reliable and energy-optimised raw water pumping solution for surface raw water sources. Grundfos is a full-line supplier of pumps, monitoring and connectivity solutions for river, lake or marine extraction.

applications.name: Ground water intake
applications.description: You require a cost-effective, reliable and energy-optimised submersible pumping solution for borehole installations. Our pumps and pump systems are optimised for the highest performance and reliability for groundwater installations.

applications.name: Drinking water treatment
applications.description: Drinking water treatment is technology-driven and heavily regulated, and you need a partner who offers pump, dosing and disinfection solutions for all water treatment processes at the water treatment plant.

applications.name: Water distribution
applications.description: Reduce water leakage and cut energy and maintenance costs with optimised pumping systems and smart pressure management. You get peace of mind from a water distribution system that delivers correct water pressure to the consumer.

applications.name: Irrigation
applications.description: Our high-efficiency pumping solutions work seamlessly with modern irrigation systems for agricultural and non-agricultural applications and can operate with on- and off-grid energy sources.

applications.name: Solar water solutions
applications.description: Grundfos supplies solar-powered water pumps and complete solar water solutions that deliver unmatched flexibility for reliable water supply with no ongoing energy costs.

applications.name: Community water supply
applications.description: Reliable, sustainable and low-risk community water systems from source to tap, including water management and revenue collection systems, for low-income remote or informal urban settlement areas in developing countries.

applicationAreas.name: Municipal wastewater
applicationAreas.description: Collecting, transporting and treating wastewater is about keeping reliability high. Grundfos products and solutions for wastewater transport, flood control and the wastewater treatment plant build on reliability, modularity and energy-efficiency from optimised pump systems and fully-integrated solutions.

applications.name: Wastewater transport
applications.description: When continuously transporting wastewater, you need reliable and optimised solutions for wastewater pumping stations and networks. Better system design, for example by using CFD simulations, tackles hydraulic issues in advance, reduces downtime and minimises risk.

applications.name: Flood control
applications.description: Grundfos supplies complete flood control systems to protect urban and rural areas, infrastructure and large cities from flooding. Our innovative solutions meet the high-flow and low-head requirements at the flood pumping station or pump gate.

applications.name: Wastewater treatment
applications.description: Treating wastewater is about maintaining optimal and effective processes at mechanical, biological and chemical treatment stages. A full-line supplier, Grundfos ensures that hydraulic stability is maintained and capacity not exceeded for all processes.

applications.name: Environmental monitoring
applications.description: Grundfos delivers reliable, real time environmental monitoring through reliable data loggers and telemetry, giving utilities early risk detection, proactive response, and confident decisions in harsh environments.

applicationAreas.name: Agriculture and irrigation
applicationAreas.description: Rely on Grundfos pumps for a high-efficient agricultural and irrigation system with minimal maintenance requirements.

applications.name: Rotor and spray irrigation
applications.description: Discover the cost-effective and energy-efficient water pumping solution for your rotor and spray irrigation. Grundfos pumps and pump systems are optimized for the highest performance for well water and surface water installations.

applications.name: Ground water transfer
applications.description: Transport water from its source with a cost-effective, reliable, and energy-efficient pumping solution for irrigation and agriculture applications.

applications.name: Livestock and wildlife watering
applications.description: Using traditional energy sources to pump water in remote areas or in large acreages can be impossible or expensive. A renewable energy-powered water supply delivers unmatched flexibility and reliability.

applications.name: Water treatment fertigation, chemigation and dosing
applications.description: Increase efficiency and uniformity when applying fertilisers and chemicals in chemigation and fertigation systems and reduce time, labour and water runoff.

applications.name: Pivot and lateral irrigation
applications.description: Enhance your outcome today with a renewable energy-powered water supply system delivering unmatched flexibility and reliability for your pivot and lateral irrigation system.

applications.name: Frost protection
applications.description: Find a reliable solution to protect your crops from frost. Grundfos pumps, systems, and controls are compatible with frost protection equipment.

applications.name: Solar boosting and water supply solutions
applications.description: Grundfos offers a complete line of low-maintenance, solar powered water pumps, inverters and power blenders that deliver unmatched flexibility for irrigation and agriculture water supply and boosting applications.

applications.name: Controls and digital groundwater management
applications.description: Optimize operational efficiencies and maintenance of your water pump system from afar with Grundfos controllers and digital solutions.

applicationAreas.name: Solar water and pumping solutions
applicationAreas.description: Grundfos offers a complete line of low-maintenance, solar-powered water pumps, solar inverters, and AC/DC power blenders that deliver unmatched flexibility for irrigation and agriculture water supply.

applications.name: Solar controls and digital water management
applications.description: Optimize operational efficiencies and maintenance of your solar-powered water pump system from afar with Grundfos controllers and digital solutions.

applications.name: Solar water treatment fertigation and dosing
applications.description: Increase efficiency and uniformity in chemigation, fertigation, and dosing systems reducing time labor with solar-powered pump solutions.

applications.name: Municipal solar solutions
applications.description: Grundfos supplies solar-powered water pumps and complete solar water solutions that deliver unmatched flexibility for reliable water supply with no ongoing energy costs.

applications.name: Agriculture solar solutions
applications.description: Enhance your irrigation and agriculture water pumping system with a solar-powered solution.

applications.name: Livestock watering with solar solutions
applications.description: Using traditional energy sources to pump water in livestock water solutions can be impossible or expensive. Our solar-powered pump solutions offer unmatched flexibility and reliability.

applications.name: Community solar solutions
applications.description: Providing community water supply to remote or informal urban locations via Solar-powered pump systems, including water management and revenue collection systems in emerging markets.

products.title: Vibration measurement
products.description: Our vibration measurement service helps you to identify if your pumps are vibrating excessively, causing wear and tear and unnecessary noise. Knowing this allows you to prevent damage from becoming too severe.

subcategories.title: Activated carbon filters
subcategories.description: Activated carbon filters are designed to adsorb a wide range of contaminants, including chlorine, PFAS, pesticides, taste, odour, and organic compounds. They are utilized across a variety of industries to ensure pure process water. Here you can find the right activated carbon filter for food industries, breweries, waterworks and wastewater treatment.

subcategories.title: Bag filters
subcategories.description: Bag filters for mechanical filtration are ideal for filtration tasks with heavy demands on flow rates along with a space-saving design. Commonly used in boiler and cooling water systems, district heating networks, and the surface treatment and electronics industries, to remove large, suspended material from water, including particles, oil, grease, solvents, and organics.

subcategories.title: CO2 degassers
subcategories.description: The intended use of the CO2 degasser is to increase the filtration capacity of another water treatment plant or increasing the pH value by reducing the dissolved CO2 before the next stage. The CO2 degasser have its advantage on its capability to degas higher water flows: after RO, after dealkalizer or between cation and anion in UPCORE demineralizer.

subcategories.title: Cartridge filters
subcategories.description: Cartridge filters come in single and multiple combinations. Using high surface area filter elements they remove small solid particles from liquids. They suit industrial processes where high levels of efficiency and extremely low-pressure losses are required.

subcategories.title: Containerized water treatment units
subcategories.description: A containerized water treatment solution offers a complete solution that are fully assembled and tested off-site, including all internal piping and wiring, making them ready for use upon delivery. Water treatment in container is ideal for locations with limited space, temporary installations, or where portability is required.

subcategories.title: Controls
subcategories.description: Pump controllers from Grundfos are designed to support a wide range of Grundfos products. These pump control systems are all constructed to be easily integrated into larger systems, making them an ideal solution if you are looking to gain complete control of pump systems.

subcategories.title: Dealkalization units
subcategories.description: Dealkalizers are typically used for boiler water to prevent scaling and avoid boiler corrosion by reducing bicarbonate hardness in water. They are used in a variety of industrial process, including brewing water to control the taste of the beer. Here you can find the right dealkalizer for your make-up water needs.

subcategories.title: Demineralization units
subcategories.description: Demineralization units are two-column systems using ion exchange technology to provide high-quality demineralized water without pre-treatment. Available with co-current and counter-current regeneration, they ensure high operational reliability and low costs. Demineralization units are used in a variety of applications, including make-up water for boiler water, and rinse water.

subcategories.title: Electrodionization (EDI) units
subcategories.description: Electrodeionization (EDI) units polish demineralized water to achieve low conductivity and silica levels. Using ion exchange membranes, resins, and electricity, EDI produces high-quality water without regeneration downtime, serving as an alternative to mixed bed polishers. Applications include boiler feedwater, process water in electronics, pharmaceuticals, hospitals, and labs.

subcategories.title: Hydrodynamic separators
subcategories.description: Hydrodynamic separators use the centrifugal movement of water to separate solids from liquid. Water runs through a pipe with strong centrifugal energy to allow heavier solids to collect in a lower accumulation chamber as the clarified water flows upwards.

subcategories.title: Membrane bioreactors
subcategories.description: A membrane bioreactor (MBR) is a wastewater treatment technology useful for many industrial and municipal applications. It combines a biological treatment process with a membrane filtration system to separate solids from liquids and biomolecules.

subcategories.title: Membrane degassing units
subcategories.description: Grundfos membrane degassing units (MDU) are used to remove dissolved gases, such as oxygen and carbon dioxide, from water without any chemical treatment. This process is crucial in various applications to improve water quality and protect downstream equipment. Typical applications for MDU include boiler feedwater, make-up water for district heating systems, semiconductor manufacturing, pharma, and labs.

subcategories.title: Mixed bed
subcategories.description: Grundfos mixed bed units are used for polishing of demineralized water to obtain high-purity water with conductivities as low as 0.1  S/cm. Available with flow rates up to 50 m /h, they can operate continuously in duplex or triplex setups, ensuring reliability and efficiency in industrial processes.

subcategories.title: Multilayer filters
subcategories.description: Multi-layer filters are used in many industries to efficiently and effectively filter water and other liquids. The technique uses multiple layers of filter material to trap solids, contaminants or other micro pullutants, as well as taste, colour and odour.

subcategories.title: Pressure filters
subcategories.description: Grundfos pressure filters effectively remove arsenic, iron, manganese, ammonia, turbidity, and other contaminants. These filters operate under pressure, forcing water through a filtration medium, which can include sand, gravel, or specialized media. Ideal for both municipal and industrial applications, pressure filters ensure clean, safe drinking water quality.

subcategories.title: Reverse osmosis units
subcategories.description: Grundfos reverse osmosis units are designed to maximize water savings and energy efficiency. Equipped with cutting-edge pumps, these units reduce energy consumption while delivering high-quality purified water. Ideal for a variety of industrial applications, they ensure high operational reliability, easy maintenance, and cost-effectiveness.

subcategories.title: Softening units
subcategories.description: Grundfos offers a diverse range of water softening systems for industrial applications. They reduce water hardness, treat different flow rates, and incorporate advanced technologies for efficiency. Available in Simplex, Duplex and Triplex versions for high operational reliability.

subcategories.title: Standard motors
subcategories.description: Solid design and a range of construction features provide trouble-free operation and increase the operating lifetime for Grundfos standard motors and match the very high standard of Grundfos pumps.

subcategories.title: Thermal deaerators
subcategories.description: Grundfos thermal deaerators efficiently remove dissolved gases like oxygen and carbon dioxide from feedwater, preventing corrosion and enhancing boiler performance. Designed for high pressure tolerance, the deaerator ensures high-quality, degassed water for boiler systems. Available as spray-type and spray & tray-type including a vertical dome for higher water quality.

subcategories.title: UV disinfection units
subcategories.description: Designed for both portable water as well as industrial applications, these units utilize ultraviolet (UV) light to effectively eliminate harmful microorganisms, including bacteria, viruses, and fungi. UV disinfection units can be in permanent operation or commissioned periodically for maximum operational reliability.

subcategories.title: Ultrafiltration units
subcategories.description: Ultrafiltration units from Grundfos separate insoluble particles form the water by separation underpressure. Ultrafiltration is a versatile filtration technology, that tolerate different water qualities making it ideal for groundwater and surface water treatment, as well as Seawater desalination pretreatment applications.

subcategories.title: Control panels
subcategories.description: Complete panel solution for pump applications including the Grundfos variable frequency drive.

subcategories.title: Drive and inverters
subcategories.description: Range of external frequency converters designed for speed control of a wide range of Grundfos pumps including off-grid solar inverters

subcategories.title: IO modules
subcategories.description: On/Off controls, and input modules for use in control panels designed to fit into a DIN rail

subcategories.title: Sensors
subcategories.description: Grundfos offers a wide range of reliable and accurate sensors which will provide the data you need to optimise system performance.

subcategories.title: Protection, monitoring and connectivity
subcategories.description: Range of products for motor protection, Sensor Module and Communication Interface

subcategories.title: Circulator pumps
subcategories.description: Grundfos circulator pumps are designed for best-in-class efficiency with low maintenance. Compared to conventional circulators, they cut energy consumption by up to 80 %, while delivering noise-free performance. Here you can find the right circulator pump for your heating, cooling and hot water recirculation needs.

subcategories.title: Submersible wastewater pumps
subcategories.description: Grundfos submersible wastewater pumps are designed as sealed units combining a pump and integrated motor that can operate below the surface of wastewater. Submersible wastewater pumps are perfect in permanent installations for efficient removal of wastewater from a property whether from washing machines, sinks and showers or drainage from the garden.

subcategories.title: Solutions
subcategories.description: Grundfos solutions is where we offer you the significant advantages of full optimisation for your complete system. Grundfos solutions can be tailored for a specific application or installation in buildings, industry, water utility and water treatment.

subcategories.title: Submersible groundwater pumps
subcategories.description: Grundfos submersible pumps represent advanced hydraulic design and offer high efficiency, high resistance to sand and other abrasives, motor burnout protection and easy maintenance. Made entirely of corrosion-resistant stainless steel, Grundfos submersible pumps are ideal for applications including groundwater supply, irrigation, groundwater lowering and pressure boosting.

subcategories.title: Inline single stage pumps
subcategories.description: In-line single-stage pumps are typically used in commercial buildings for air-conditioning and heating applications. The pumps are equipped with standard motors and mechanical shaft seals. They are close-coupled, meaning that the pump and motor are two separate units, making them less sensitive to impurities in the pumped liquid.

subcategories.title: Inline multi stage pumps
subcategories.description: In-line multi-stage pumps are used in installations in which a high head is needed. Several impeller stages are connected in series and the inlet and outlet are on the same level. In-line multi-stage pumps are used for water supply, water treatment and almost any industrial solution including those for aggressive liquids.

subcategories.title: Booster sets
subcategories.description: Grundfos offers booster sets for hospitals, high-rise apartment blocks, irrigation systems and other purposes where there is a need for constant pressure to meet varying demand on the water supply. Check out the broad selection of Grundfos booster sets here.

subcategories.title: Split case pumps
subcategories.description: Split case pumps are in-line pumps in which the pump housing is divided axially into two parts. Split case pumps are characterised by their high efficiency and low noise levels, as well as how easy they are to service. The pumps are designed to work in a variety of applications, including public water supply, district cooling and HVAC systems.

subcategories.title: Endsuction close coupled single stage
subcategories.description: End-suction close-coupled single-stage pumps are common in every industrial facility and water treatment plant in the world. Available in both a vertical and horizontal design, the end-suction close-coupled single-stage pumps are easy to install thanks to the compact size and the 90 degree angle from inlet to outlet.

subcategories.title: Endsuction long coupled single stage
subcategories.description: End-suction long-coupled single-stage pumps are ideal for large-scale industrial applications. As with all end-suction pumps, the liquid runs directly into the impeller and the inlet and outlet form a 90 degree angle to each other. The long-coupled design makes the pumps easy to service and maintain.

subcategories.title: Mixing loop
subcategories.description: Grundfos MIXIT is an all-in-one mixing loop with flexible offerings and features designed to accommodate every need in both heating and cooling systems. MIXIT has a built-in actuator, controller and sensors, making designing, installing and operating mixing loops simple and easy.

subcategories.title: Endsuction close coupled multistage
subcategories.description: In an end-suction close-coupled multi-stage pump, the liquid runs directly into the impeller and the inlet and outlet form a 90 degree angle to each other. The pumps typically produce high pressure relative to flow, making them ideal multi-purpose pumps for both industry and water boosting in general.

subcategories.title: Endsuction machine tool pumps
subcategories.description: End-suction machine tool pumps provide accuracy and stability to eliminate interference with delicate machining processes such as boring, spark erosion, turning, sawing, wire cutting and milling. Designed for circulating and recycling lubricating coolants, they are an optimal solution for all industrial processes involving machine tools.

subcategories.title: Horizontal multistage pumps
subcategories.description: Horizontal multi-stage pumps with several impeller stages connected in series, are perfect for applications where high head is needed, such as pressure boosting and liquid transfer in almost any industrial application.

subcategories.title: Immersible pumps
subcategories.description: An immersible pump means that the pump itself is immersed in the pumped liquid. They are typically mounted on top of or inside tanks or containers. Immersible pumps are often used in the machine tool industry for example, in spark machine tools, grinding machines, machining centres and cooling units or in other industrial applications involving tanks or containers.

subcategories.title: Solar modules
subcategories.description: Grundfos solar energy modules deliver high flexibility for reliable power supply with no ongoing energy costs. Grundfos has a solar power solution that matches any application on farms, ranches, in or around the home and for communities in developing countries.

subcategories.title: Encapsulated pumps
subcategories.description: Encapsulated pumps are compact, simple-to-install, stainless steel pumps with motor units that are encapsulated in a pressure sleeve, hermetically sealing and protecting the unit as well as ensuring low maintenance and low noise levels. They are suitable for a variety of applications, including domestic water supply.

subcategories.title: Lifting station
subcategories.description: Grundfos installation-ready lifting stations ensure efficient and reliable removal of wastewater from a buildings wastewater pumping station.

subcategories.title: Diaphragm pumps
subcategories.description: Designed for mechanical or digital control, you can rely on Grundfos diaphragm pumps to provide the accuracy, durability and reliability you need for water and wastewater treatment, industrial processing and many other applications.

subcategories.title: Fire systems
subcategories.description: Get a complete overview of highly reliable fire protection pumps and systems from Grundfos for on- and offshore applications.

subcategories.title: Digital dosing pumps
subcategories.description: Intelligent dosing pumps are the ideal solution for any kinds of complex dosing in less aggressive environments. Offering a high level of accuracy, digital dosing pumps not only reduce the chemical waste, but also the energy bill.

subcategories.title: Hydro boosters
subcategories.description: Grundfos offers booster sets for hospitals, high-rise apartment blocks, irrigation systems and other purposes where there is a need for constant pressure to meet varying demand on the water supply. Check out the broad selection of Grundfos booster sets here.

subcategories.title: Digital services
subcategories.description: Connected pumps open up a world of opportunities for true data-based optimisation taking pump performance to a new level.

subcategories.title: Operation services
subcategories.description: Keep your system running smoothly with our wide range of pump operation service offerings. We maximise the performance and efficiency of your system, allowing you all the time you need to focus on your business. And, we make sure you get the best performance out of every pump and pump system.

subcategories.title: Optimisation services
subcategories.description: Pumps help run the air-conditioning systems that keep us cool and ensure warm water in showers. But they can also waste enormous amounts of energy. And with 85 % of the total life-cycle cost of a pump spent on energy usage, ensuring pump efficiency makes good sense. Grundfos can help you reduce energy consumption, improve pump efficiency and find the hidden savings in your pumps.

subcategories.title: Repair services
subcategories.description: Keep your system up and running with our wide range of pump repair services. Our team of highly skilled service technicians can resolve any kind of pump problem, while ensuring that you get the maximum performance from every pump and pump system.

subcategories.title: Service agreements
subcategories.description: Keep your system running in top condition and experience reduced operating costs, predictable maintenance costs and increased system lifetime. With a Grundfos service agreement, you can leave your service, maintenance and analysis to experienced professionals.

subcategories.title: Submersible motors
subcategories.description: Designed for reliability, high efficiency and to keep lifecycle costs low, Grundfos submersible motors match the best efficiency point of the pump and are perfect for all submersible applications.

subcategories.title: Accessories electrically
subcategories.description: Get a quick overview of the Grundfos electrical accessories that can make your pump solution a perfect fit for a wide variety of applications.
